title: brickellia lanata
intro: Brickellia lanata, also known as "Gray Headed Brickellia" or "Guanabano", is a perennial shrub native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico, belonging to the Asteraceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. Brickellia lanata can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its roots are often used in folk remedies to treat various ailments.
